title: Hisuian Decidueye Battle Guide
summary: A [Grass]/[Fighting] physical attacker whose signature [triple-arrows] stacks Def drops, flinches, and crit chances in one move.
weaknesses: Speed 60 is slow for an attacker
bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Hisuian Decidueye is a [Grass]/[Fighting] physical attacker built around its signature move [triple-arrows] — a 90 BP [Fighting] STAB that has high crit chance, 50% Def drop, and 30% flinch chance all stacked on the same move. The multi-debuff nature makes it excellent for breaking down defensive cores.

## Strengths
[triple-arrows] is an all-in-one wall-breaking tool — the Def drop stacks across consecutive hits, lowering the opponent's bulk to the point where [leaf-blade] KOs guaranteed. [Grass]/[Fighting] STAB covers [Water], [Ground], [Rock], [Normal], [Dark], and more. Bulky stat line allows switch-in and trading plays.

## Weaknesses & Answers
Four common weakness types mean careful switch reads. Speed 60 is slow, so [sucker-punch] priority picks up the slack. [Fire] and [Flying] threats need external coverage.

## Recommended Moveset
[triple-arrows] is the signature move. [leaf-blade] is the high-crit [Grass] STAB. [sucker-punch] handles faster threats. [protect] is standard.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[life-orb] is the default. [choice-band] maximizes power but locks moves. [overgrow] boosts [leaf-blade] at low HP; [scrappy] enables [Fighting] hitting [Ghost]. Tera [Fighting] stacks [triple-arrows], Tera [Grass] boosts [leaf-blade].

## Teammates & Synergy
Cover [Fire] and [Flying] with [Water] and [Electric] partners. [Dark] and [Bug] handle [Psychic] and [Fairy] matchups. [tailwind] support mitigates the Speed issue.

## Play Patterns
Click [triple-arrows] repeatedly to stack Def drops, then finish with [leaf-blade] when the target is weakened. Use [sucker-punch] for priority cleanup. Switch out against [Fire] or [Flying] attackers.
